faqs.question: What pests are most common in Flatlands, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Flatlands residents commonly encounter German cockroaches, ants, mice, rats, and occasional bed bugs. The neighborhood's housing mix and proximity to green spaces can attract rodents and insects, especially during warmer months. Our general pest control service addresses all these common pests with comprehensive treatment plans.
